insight:
- The "Reinforcement learning / Piled / Grasp policy" group (3 methods) includes DeepRLManip, Dex-Net 2.1, Dex-Net 4.0. Dominant attributes: Method: Reinforcement learning, Train: Sim, Scene: Piled.
- The "Direct regression / Singulated / 2D grasp rectangle (x, y, width, height, angle)" group (4 methods) includes Dex-Net 2.0 (GQ-CNN), ggcnn_plus, GraspSAM and 1 more. Dominant attributes: Method: Direct regression, Train: Real, Scene: Singulated.
- The "Grasp evaluation + Sampler / Singulated / Grasp success probability" group (13 methods) includes 🤖 QD-Grasp, 7DGCG, DexDiffuser and 10 more. Dominant attributes: Method: Grasp evaluation + Sampler, Train: Sim, Scene: Singulated.
- The "Reinforcement learning / Singulated / Grasp policy" group (7 methods) includes Dex-Net 3.0, Goal-Auxiliary Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (GA-DDPG), GRAFF (Grasp-Affordances) and 4 more. Dominant attributes: Method: Reinforcement learning, Train: Sim, Scene: Singulated.
- The "Sampling / Singulated / 6-DoF grasp pose (x, y, z, r, p, y)" group (4 methods) includes Deep Dexterous Grasping (DDG), Deep Dexterous Grasping in Clutter (DDGC), Multi-FinGAN and 1 more. Dominant attributes: Method: Sampling, Train: Sim, Scene: Singulated.
- The "Direct regression / Structured / 6-DoF grasp pose (x, y, z, r, p, y)" group (5 methods) includes Contact-GraspNet, EquiGraspFlow, GeomPickPlace and 2 more. Dominant attributes: Method: Direct regression, Train: Sim, Scene: Structured.
- The "Sampling / Piled / 6-DoF grasp pose (x, y, z, r, p, y)" group (17 methods) includes 🤖 MISCGrasp, 3DAPNet, 6-DoF GraspNet and 14 more. Dominant attributes: Method: Sampling, Train: Sim, Scene: Piled.
- The "Direct regression / Piled / 7-DoF grasp pose (x, y, z, r, p, y, approach angle)" group (5 methods) includes AnyGrasp, Grasp Proposal Network (GPNet), PointNet++ Grasping and 2 more. Dominant attributes: Method: Direct regression, Train: Sim, Scene: Piled.
